title: If candles are human emotions, will it still be candles when AI takes over?
author: Next-Syrup6935
selftext:
Its just a matter of time really, when it is controlled by 50%+ of AI and AI have no emotions, then what will the candles turn into? LOL

It's weird but the movement of markets are determined by emotions, each candle is a emotion, fear, greed all of them.

AI have none..

Therefore when everyone uses AI Trading platforms such as [Tickrad ](http://tickrad.com)that produces clear positions with AI model trained on historical data then it'll all be cooked.
